task_description: Build an automated trading bot for Binance Alpha market tokens. The bot monitors 1-minute candles for all Alpha tokens, buys when a candle shows >5% price increase with volume confirmation, uses dynamic trailing stop-loss for profit-taking, time-based stop-loss for exits, and includes blacklist management, cooldown periods, daily limits, Feishu notifications, and SQLite trade recording. Connects to Binance testnet by default.

verification.summary: All 35 tests pass. pip install succeeds. main.py --check validates config and exits cleanly. v2 review fixes applied: config.yaml untracked, position state flushed in manage_positions, blacklist seeding error handling improved (re-raise + catch in main), new test_storage.py with real SQLite tests for position persistence, recent traded symbols, and blacklist seeding.
